data.description: Philippines’ Marcos signals continued adherence to oil contracts, reinforcing confidence in supply agreements and energy stability.
Philippines’ Marcos stated that authorities are actively pursuing additional sources of oil supply to enhance energy security.

data.title: Air Traffic Management Market worth $15.20 billion by 2030 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In DELRAY BEACH, Fla., a report from MarketsandMarkets™ reveals that the Air Traffic Management Market is projected to generate USD 12.20 billion in 2025, with estimates indicating it will grow to USD 15.20 billion by 2030. This growth signifies a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.5% throughout the forecast duration. Interested individuals can explore 180 pieces of market data related to this sector.
China phone shipments drop 14.6% y/y to 16.8 million in February, CAICT says.

data.title: Zelluna ASA [ZLNA]: Annual Report 2025
data.description: Zelluna ASA, based in Oslo, Norway, a leader in developing allogeneic T Cell Receptor-based Natural Killer (TCR-NK) cell therapies for solid cancers, has revealed that its Board of Directors has given the green light to the Annual Report for the year 2025. This signifies a significant milestone for the company as they continue to make advancements in the field of cancer treatment.
OVHcloud announces the acquisition of Dragon LLM, a developer of specialized generative AI models, and is launching its AI lab to offer new services to its customers based on LLMs

data.title: REALLOCATION OF TREASURY SHARES HELD IN CONNECTION WITH THE SHARE BUYBACK PROGRAM
data.description: At a meeting on March 20, 2026, the Board of Directors of OVH Groupe S.A. decided to repurpose approximately 850,000 of the company's treasury shares. These shares were originally designated for employee stock ownership plans but will now be used for delivering shares as part of payment in external growth transactions in the future.
Valourec secures five OCTG product contracts in Indonesia.

data.title: Annual General Meeting 2026: Tecan proposes the election of three new members of the Board of Directors and a new Chairman
data.description: In the upcoming Annual General Meeting of 2026, Tecan has put forth a proposal for the appointment of three fresh members to the Board of Directors and a new Chairman. This move signifies a significant change in leadership at the company and highlights Tecan's commitment to refreshing its board with new talent. The addition of the three new board members and a new Chairman is aimed at bringing diverse perspectives and expertise to the decision-making process. Shareholders will have the opportunity to vote on these proposals during the meeting, which is a crucial step in shaping the future direction of the company.

data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda on March 25, 2026, Flex LNG Ltd. (NYSE: FLNG) has confirmed a Time Charter Agreement ("TC") for their vessel, Flex Aurora, with a minimum firm duration of two (2) years. The charterer, a Supermajor, will also have the option to...
International Energy Agency states it stands ready to release additional volumes from strategic oil reserves as needed to support market stability.

data.title: Chewy, AAR And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Wednesday
data.description: U.S. stock futures are up this morning, drawing attention to specific stocks. Chewy Inc. (NYSE: CHWY) is expected to announce quarterly earnings of 9 cents per share with revenue reaching $3.29 billion prior to the opening bell. In after-hours trading, Chewy shares climbed 1.9% to $23.89. Meanwhile, Arm Holdings Plc (NASDAQ: ARM) experienced a surge in Tuesday's after-hours market after revealing aspirations to reach $15 billion in annual sales from their new in-house chip. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

Iranian media: 5 explosions at a missile site in Isfahan this morning

data.title: Irish authorities access lost Bitcoin wallet holding 500 BTC linked to drug dealer, moved to Coinbase.
data.description: On Tuesday, it was reported that a crypto wallet linked to a convicted drug dealer, who is believed to have misplaced his wallet keys, sent 500 Bitcoin to Coinbase.

data.title: Investors are genuinely accumulating Bitcoin as seen in exchange outflows, impacting its trading within a narrow range.
data.description: According to crypto analysts, the current stability in Bitcoin trading could be attributed to the continuous accumulation of the cryptocurrency. This accumulation is seen as one of the key reasons why Bitcoin is trading within a narrow range.

data.title: Increasing US Treasury yields, Iran conflict, and inflation fears suppress Bitcoin price; tech stocks plummet as bond yields rise, stifling Bitcoin's growth.
data.description: The decline in technology stock prices and the increase in bond yields have led to a surge in demand for cash, hindering Bitcoin from experiencing any significant bullish movement.

data.title: CFTC head starts innovation group aiming to create crypto rules, working with industry on AI, prediction markets.
data.description: A team of experts will collaborate with members of the industry to create strategies for regulating cryptocurrency, artificial intelligence, and prediction markets. The main focus will be on exploring innovative methods to address these emerging technologies and ensure compliance. The task force aims to leverage diverse perspectives to develop effective regulatory frameworks that balance innovation with risk management. These initiatives will involve input from various stakeholders and aim to stay at the forefront of advancements in these fields.

data.title: BitGo and Susquehanna introduce OTC prediction market trading for institutions to trade event contracts using crypto collateral amidst US regulatory focus.
data.description: Institutional investors now have the opportunity to engage in trading event-based contracts with the use of crypto collateral. This move comes at a time when the regulatory scrutiny surrounding prediction markets is escalating in the United States. The offering enables investors to leverage cryptocurrency as collateral for trading these contracts, amidst growing attention on prediction market activities.

data.title: BTC price drops to $69.5K on geopolitical concerns, hinting at a market shift as analysts observe changing behavior.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin dropped below $70,000 against the backdrop of geopolitical tensions. Analysts are observing indications that suggest a possible change in market dynamics.
